title: senecio infirmus
intro: Senecio infirmus, also known as Jacob's ladder, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including soothing respiratory issues and reducing fever, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Senecio infirmus can be used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
